description: Apigee is Google Cloud’s API management platform for developing, securing, publishing, and operating APIs. It provides control-plane APIs and tooling for managing Apigee organizations, environments, proxies, products, and related resources.
summary: Apigee on apigee.googleapis.com exposes a REST management API, a public MCP endpoint at https://apigee.googleapis.com/mcp, and a gcloud apigee CLI; the API and CLI use Google Cloud OAuth access tokens.
